name: Lemon Custard Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 angel food cake, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cake pieces in a 13 x 9 inches pan.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the lemon pudding, milk, and sour cream.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over the cake pieces.
4. Spoon the strawberry pie filling on top.
